title: Compact Sample Character Sheet
body_markdown:
The character sheet is designed to be compact. The sample version shows how a first-level character may be filled out.

⚔ Grimoire & Steel ⚔

Character Sheet — Sample

### Identity | Field | Value | |---|---| | Name | Garron Stonehand | | Player | Sample Player | | Kin | Dwarf | | Calling | Blade | | Level | 1 | | AP | 0 | | Background | Former tunnel guard | | Goal | Recover his clan’s stolen battle standard | ### Traits | Trait | Bonus | |---|---:| | Might | +2 | | Grace | +0 | | Wits | -1 | | Spirit | +1 | ### Gifts | Source | Gift | |---|---| | Dwarf | Add +1 Life | | Blade | Once per fight, add +1d6 damage after hitting |
### Training | Training | Use | |---|---| | Axes | Axe attacks | | Shields | Shield fighting and defense | | Survival | Travel, tracking, harsh conditions | ### Personality Loyal, blunt, stubborn. ### Combat | Stat | Value | |---|---:| | Life | 13 | | Defense | 13 | | Armor | Mail +2 | | Shield | Yes, +1 | | Main Attack | Hand axe | | Attack Bonus | +4 | | Damage | 1d6 | Life: **10 + Might + Dwarf Gift = 13** Defense: **10 + Grace + Armor + Shield = 13**
### Weapons | Weapon | Damage | Notes | |---|---:|---| | Hand axe | 1d6 | One-handed | | Dagger | 1d4 | Backup | ### Armor & Gear | Item | Notes | |---|---| | Mail armor | +2 Defense | | Shield | +1 Defense | | Travel pack | Bedroll, rations, rope, flint, waterskin | | Clan token | Stone charm from home | | Torch | Useful in dark ruins | ### Magic This character does not know any spells. | Spell | Effect | |---|---| | None | — | Strain Limit: Not used unless the character learns magic. ### Notes A sturdy front-line character. Good at melee combat and survival. Weak Wits makes lore, puzzles, and careful searching harder.
---

title: Compact Blank Character Sheet
body_markdown:
Use this blank sheet for a new character. It is intentionally compact so it can be printed with fewer pages.

⚔ Grimoire & Steel ⚔

Character Sheet

### Identity | Field | Value | |---|---| | Name | | | Player | | | Kin | | | Calling | | | Level | | | AP | | | Background | | | Goal | | ### Traits Assign: **+2, +1, +0, -1** | Trait | Bonus | |---|---:| | Might | | | Grace | | | Wits | | | Spirit | | ### Gifts | Source | Gift | |---|---| | Kin | | | Calling | |
### Training A new character begins with **three Trainings**. | Training | Use | |---|---| | | | | | | | | | | | | ### Personality ________________________________________________ ________________________________________________ ### Combat | Stat | Value | |---|---:| | Life | | | Defense | | | Armor | | | Shield | | | Main Attack | | | Attack Bonus | | | Damage | | Life: **10 + Might = ______** Defense: **10 + Grace + Armor + Shield = ______**
### Weapons | Weapon | Damage | Notes | |---|---:|---| | | | | | | | | | | | | ### Armor & Gear | Item | Notes | |---|---| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ### Magic | Spell | Effect | |---|---| | | | | | | | | | Strain Limit: **3 + Spirit = ______** ### Notes ________________________________________________ ________________________________________________ ________________________________________________ ________________________________________________
